# OmicsClaw — Merged Single-Cell & Core dependencies
# Generated by combining requirements.txt, requirements_sc_strict.txt, and requirements_sc_minimal.txt
#
# For the full optional methods (Tier 3):
#   pip install -e ".[full]"
# For deep learning spatial domains (Tier 2):
#   pip install -e ".[spatial-domains]"
# For development tools (Tier 4):
#   pip install -e ".[dev]"

# NOTE: arboreto 0.1.6 (2020) is incompatible with dask 2024.x
# If GRNBoost2 fails, sc-grn automatically falls back to correlation-based GRN
# For full pySCENIC support, consider: dask==2021.11.2 distributed==2021.11.2
